title: rubus × plicatiformis
intro: Rubus × plicatiformis, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan black raspberry, is a hybrid species of flowering plant in the rose family. This plant is rich in antioxidants and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which may help to soothe digestive issues and reduce the risk of certain diseases. The health benefits of Rubus × plicatiformis include its potential to aid in weight loss, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. Rubus × plicatiformis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and supplements, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
